nodes.label: Michael Shellenberger
nodes.summary: American journalist; founder of Public.io. Known for Twitter Files reporting, governmental abuse-of-power stories (FBI entrapment, disinformation ops). Speaks Portuguese; previously lived in Brazil; did original reporting on Varginha 1996. Broke 2024 'Immaculate Constellation' UAP program story via anonymous DoD-source leak.

sources.quote: Journalist; Public.io; broke Immaculate Constellation UFO program story

nodes.label: Immaculate Constellation Report
nodes.summary: Leaked 'Immaculate Constellation' report on US government secret UAP/UFO program — leaked to Michael Shellenberger from an anonymous source within (he protects) in-position-to-know reaches. The program was managed by DoD but held at the White House per a later single-source confirmation.

sources.timestamp_end: Leaked UAP program report from DoD to Shellenberger 2024

nodes.label: 2024 UAP House Oversight Hearing (Rayburn)
nodes.summary: November 2024 UAP-topic House Oversight Committee hearing held at Rayburn House Office Building. The second-ever public UAP oversight hearing after July 2023. Shellenberger tweeted the Immaculate Constellation report live during the hearing.

sources.timestamp_end: Follow-up oversight hearing where Shellenberger shared the Immaculate Constellation report

nodes.label: Shellenberger published the leaked 'Immaculate Constellation' report on a US government secret UAP p
nodes.summary: Shellenberger published the leaked 'Immaculate Constellation' report on a US government secret UAP program — sourced anonymously from an in-position-to-know insider. Report tweeted live during the November 2024 Rayburn oversight hearing.

sources.quote: Immaculate Constellation report on the US government secret UAP UFO program — Shellenberger just tweeted the Immaculate Constellation report that was discussed by Congress in today's hearing.

type_specific.statement_text: Shellenberger published the leaked 'Immaculate Constellation' report on a US government secret UAP program — sourced anonymously from an in-position-to-know insider. Report tweeted live during the November 2024 Rayburn oversight hearing.

nodes.label: Shellenberger was told AFTER publication that the Immaculate Constellation USAP was actually managed
nodes.summary: Shellenberger was told AFTER publication that the Immaculate Constellation USAP was actually managed by the Department of Defense but HELD AT THE WHITE HOUSE — single-source, unverified.

sources.quote: After I published I was told that this program, that the USAP was actually managed by the Department of Defense but held at the White House. That's a single source and I don't have multiple sources to verify that.

type_specific.statement_text: Shellenberger was told AFTER publication that the Immaculate Constellation USAP was actually managed by the Department of Defense but HELD AT THE WHITE HOUSE — single-source, unverified.

nodes.label: Shellenberger's entry into UFO journalism: he lived in Brazil, speaks Portuguese; did original repor
nodes.summary: Shellenberger's entry into UFO journalism: he lived in Brazil, speaks Portuguese; did original reporting on the Varginha 1996 crash and interviewed someone who had seen photos of the alleged creature — two-page New York Post spread.

sources.quote: The first piece I did was on the famous Brazil crash in Varginha. I lived in Brazil, I speak Portuguese. I ended up doing some original reporting to verify some of the claims that James Fox was making. I interviewed someone that actually had seen the photographs of the alleged creature.

type_specific.statement_text: Shellenberger's entry into UFO journalism: he lived in Brazil, speaks Portuguese; did original reporting on the Varginha 1996 crash and interviewed someone who had seen photos of the alleged creature — two-page New York Post spread.

nodes.label: During the November 2024 hearing, Congressman Higgins explicitly attempted to trick Shellenberger in
nodes.summary: During the November 2024 hearing, Congressman Higgins explicitly attempted to trick Shellenberger into revealing Immaculate Constellation sources: 'I tried to trick you' — Shellenberger protected identity including gender and agency.

sources.quote: Congressman Higgins was like 'I tried to trick you.' You have to remember not to reveal anything about them — their gender, their agency. I try to keep the universe pretty big.

type_specific.statement_text: During the November 2024 hearing, Congressman Higgins explicitly attempted to trick Shellenberger into revealing Immaculate Constellation sources: 'I tried to trick you' — Shellenberger protected identity including gender and agency.

nodes.label: Shellenberger's stated motivation: 'I don't believe this is being kept secret from us simply to prot
nodes.summary: Shellenberger's stated motivation: 'I don't believe this is being kept secret from us simply to protect methods. I think it's being kept secret for deeper reasons. The intelligence community is treating us like children. It's time for us to know the truth.'

sources.quote: I don't believe that this is being kept secret from us simply to protect methods. I think it's being kept secret from us for deeper reasons. The intelligence community is treating us like children. It's time for us to know the truth about this. I think that we can handle it.

type_specific.statement_text: Shellenberger's stated motivation: 'I don't believe this is being kept secret from us simply to protect methods. I think it's being kept secret for deeper reasons. The intelligence community is treating us like children. It's time for us to know the truth.'
